data.title: Implement --truncate mode in apply-attribution-trailers.sh (SC-6)
data.description: Implement '--truncate' flag in plugins/dso/scripts/apply-attribution-trailers.sh. When invoked with --truncate: truncate $ARTIFACTS_DIR/attribution-contributors.jsonl to zero bytes (: > file or truncate -s 0). If file absent: exit 0 (no error). If truncation fails (unwritable path, permission denied): emit warning to stderr and exit 0 (SC-6 failure contract: /dso:commit must not fail). AC: (1) populated JSONL -> truncated to 0 bytes (wc -c equals 0); (2) absent JSONL -> exit 0; (3) truncation failure (make JSONL unwritable before call) -> warning on stderr, exit 0; (4) all T7-test tests pass; (5) validate.sh --ci passes.
